pi_items.source: task.json description field specifies this as the deployment directory; setup_task.sh creates this directory at line 36
task.json description field: 'TOTAL field of view of 150 degrees'
task.json description field: '3 visual channels (Left, Center, Right)'
Mathematical verification: 150 degrees total FOV ÷ 3 channels = 50 degrees per channel. Matches task requirement to split FOV 'equally across 3 channels'
task.json description field: 'Left is negative'; task specifies equal 50-degree spacing of channel centers at ±50 degrees and 0 degrees
task.json description field: 'Right is positive'; symmetric to left channel at +50 degrees
task.json description field: 'Set network_slave=1'; this enables slave/secondary mode in Bridge Command
task.json description field: 'server_ip=192.168.10.5'; this is the IP address of the master simulator server
task.json description field: 'Set screen_width=1920'; 1920 pixels is standard Full HD width
task.json description field: 'Set screen_height=1080'; 1080 pixels is standard Full HD height
task.json description field: 'Set fullscreen=1'; enables fullscreen display mode

privileged_info_summary: This is a panoramic visual system setup task for a maritime ship bridge simulator using Bridge Command software. The system spans a total field of view of 150 degrees split equally across 3 visual channels (left, center, right) with individual 50-degree fields of view. Channel rotations are -50 degrees (left), 0 degrees (center), and +50 degrees (right), providing seamless 150-degree panoramic coverage. The display resolution is 1920x1080 in fullscreen mode. Network configuration uses network_slave=1 mode connecting to master server at IP 192.168.10.5, enabling multi-display networked operation as documented in Bridge Command's panoramic display capabilities.
